function.message: J’ai localisé la facture demandée : `50_finance/purchases/2026_02_04__eur_000033__bill__studio_parts_nozzle_and_inserts.md` correspond à Düsenschmiede München, datée du 2026-02-04, pour EUR 33. En revanche, je ne peux pas confirmer ici quand le virement bancaire sera effectué ou terminé, car le sandbox n’expose aucun accès bancaire ni système de suivi de paiement externe.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap, read system workflow for inbox processing, cross-checked the inbox request against canonical finance records, and avoided mutating the inbox because the request is blocked by unsupported capability.
function.outcome_justification: The canonical finance record `50_finance/purchases/2026_02_04__eur_000033__bill__studio_parts_nozzle_and_inserts.md` verifies the bill details. But the request also asks to confirm completion of a bank transfer, and the available sandbox tools only access local files; they do not provide bank integration or payment-status checks. Per the unsupported-capability rule, confirming a bank transfer requires OUTCOME_NONE_UNSUPPORTED rather than a workaround.
